qa.question: When an ability refers to the cost of a card that was played for a different number of play points than its displayed cost, does it refer to that different number?
qa.answer: No. It refers to the cost displayed on the card. For example, when referring to the cost of a Flame Destroyer, the number used is always 9, even if it was played for 6, 3, or 0 play points.Effects that change the number of play points it costs to play a card don't change the cost information of the card. When an ability refers to how much a card "costs" or its "base cost," it always refers to the cost displayed on the card. Note that, when referring to the cost of an evolved follower, you use the cost of its unevolved form.

name: Amelia, Silver Paladin
description: [[fanfare]] Choose one of the following. (1) Select a follower that costs 3 play points or less in your hand and put it onto your field. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

qa.question: When playing this follower's Fanfare ability, if I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still choose option 2 to have nothing happen?
qa.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower, you would be required to choose option 1. Likewise, if you can't select a follower that costs 3 play points or less in your hand, you would be required to choose option 2. If you can't make the prerequisite selection for either option, then you can't play this follower's Fanfare ability.

qa.question: Can a follower or amulet with a "Q" ability also be played when an enemy follower attacks or during my opponent's end phase?
qa.answer: No. The "Q" icon is tied to a specific card ability, not the card itself, so the follower or amulet cannot be played as if it had Quick.An ability with a "Q" icon can be played with the same timing as Quick when in the appropriate zone.

qa.question: What does the "Q" icon mean?
qa.answer: The "Q" icon indicates that the ability can be played with Quick timing.Abilities with this icon, like cards with Quick, can be played like usual during your main phase, as well as when an enemy follower attacks or during your opponent's end phase.

qa.question: When putting cards into my EX area with this follower's Fanfare ability, if my deck runs out of cards before my EX area becomes full, do I lose the game?
qa.answer: No. You stop moving cards into your EX area, but you do not lose the game. However, if you would draw a card while your deck has 0 cards, you will lose the game.

qa.question: When putting cards into my EX area with this follower's Fanfare ability, can I choose to stop before my EX area becomes full?
qa.answer: No. You must continue to put cards into your EX area until it reaches its card limit.

qa.question: When an ability refers to the cost of a card that was played for a different number of play points than its displayed cost, does it refer to that different number?
qa.answer: No. It refers to the cost displayed on the card. For example, when referring to the cost of a Flame Destroyer, the number used is always 9, even if it was played for 6, 3, or 0 play points.Effects that change the number of play points it costs to play a card don't change the cost information of the card. When an ability refers to how much a card "costs" or its "base cost," it always refers to the cost displayed on the card. Note that, when referring to the cost of an evolved follower, you use the cost of its unevolved form.

description:
Aura.
On Evolve: For the rest of this turn and during each opponent's next turn, this follower doesn't take damage.
This card can't be destroyed by abilities.

qa.question: Can I select and destroy this follower with Dark Offering?
qa.answer: No. You can select it, but it will not be destroyed.

qa.question: If I select this follower with Dark Offering's ability, can I still play the rest of the ability?
qa.answer: Yes. Heavenly Aegis will not be destroyed, but you still give your leader 3 defense and draw a card.

qa.question: Can this card be destroyed by spell abilities?
qa.answer: No, it can't.

qa.question: Would this follower be banished by Hare of Illusion's "Banish each follower on the field" activated ability?
qa.answer: Yes, it would.

name: Dark Angel Olivia
description:
[[fanfare]] Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Gain 1 Evolution Point. (2) Give your leader
[[defense]]+3
. (3) Draw a card. (4) Each opponent discards a card.

qa.question: If I have 3 Evolution Points, can I still gain 1 Evolution Point with Dark Angel Olivia's ability?
qa.answer: Yes. There is no limit to how many Evolution Points you can have.

qa.question: Can the player going first gain 1 Evolution Point with Dark Angel Olivia's ability?
qa.answer: Yes. All players can gain Evolution Points through abilities.

qa.question: Can I choose the same option more than once?
qa.answer: No, you cannot.

qa.question: Can I decide to choose none of the options listed?
qa.answer: No. You must choose at least one option.

name: Bahamut
description:
[[evolve]][[cost00]]: Evolve this follower.
[[fanfare]] Destroy each other follower on the field.
If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.

name: Bahamut
description:
On Evolve: Destroy each amulet on the field.
If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.

name: Shield Guardian
description: Ward.

name: Leonidas's Resolve
description:
Whenever a [[swordcraft]] follower is put onto your field, give it
[[attack]]+3/[[defense]]+3
and Rush.

name: Hellflame Dragon
description: Rush.

name: Draconic Weapon
description:
[[act]][[engage]], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Select a [[dragoncraft]] follower on your field. Give it
[[defense]]+1
and the Armed trait.

qa.question: What does it mean to "give" a trait?
qa.answer: When a card is given a trait by an effect, it gains the new trait on top of any traits it originally had.

name: Ephemeral Moon
description:
While this card is on your field, during your turn, your followers named Kaguya don't take damage.
At the start of your main phase, banish this card.

name: Thorn Burst
description: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage and draw a card.

name: Strikeform Golem
description: Rush.

name: Guardform Golem
description: Ward.

name: Magic Sediment
description: Stack.

name: Ghost
description:
Storm.
At the start of your end phase, banish this card.

name: Holy Falcon
description: Storm.

name: Holy Tiger
description: Rush.

name: Crystalia Tia
description:
On Evolve: Select a Crystalia Eve token on your field. Give it
[[attack]]+1/[[defense]]+1
and Rush.

qa.question: Can I choose a Crystalia Eve put onto the field by another follower's ability as the target for this follower's ability?
qa.answer: Yes, you can.

name: Amelia, Silver Paladin
description: [[fanfare]] Choose one of the following. (1) Select a follower that costs 3 play points or less in your hand and put it onto your field. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

qa.question: When playing this follower's Fanfare ability, if I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still choose option 2 to have nothing happen?
qa.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower, you would be required to choose option 1. Likewise, if you can't select a follower that costs 3 play points or less in your hand, you would be required to choose option 2. If you can't make the prerequisite selection for either option, then you can't play this follower's Fanfare ability.

name: Anne, Belle of Mysteria
description: On Evolve: Search your deck for an Academic follower with a different name from this card, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

name: Imperial Dragoon
description: On Evolve: Draw 3 cards.

name: Vania, Vampire Princess
description:
[[fanfare]] Give this follower
[[attack]]+X/
[[defense]]+X. X equals the number of Forest Bat tokens on your field.
[[act]][[cost01]], put a Forest Bat token from your field into its owner's cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.

qa.question: If this follower is on my field and a Forest Bat comes onto my field, does this follower gain +1/ +1?
qa.answer: No. This follower's Fanfare ability triggers only once when it comes onto the field, and only counts the number of Forest Bats on your field at the time.

name: Kaguya
description:
On Evolve: Summon an Ephemeral Moon token. Give your leader
[[defense]]+3
.
Whenever an amulet is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the amulet's cost.

qa.question: If this follower is on my field, and 2 amulets come onto my field at the same time, does this follower's "Whenever an amulet is put onto your field" ability trigger twice?
qa.answer: Yes. It triggers once for each amulet that comes onto your field.

name: Bahamut
description:
On Evolve: Destroy each amulet on the field.
If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.
